UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile information saved when logging in with Google

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user

name.description: The displayName of the user from Google

email.description: The email address of the user

photoURL.description: The profile photo URL of the user

role.description: The role of the member in the community

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was registered

name.description: The name of the educational app

description.description: Fully detailed description of what the app does

link.description: Direct URL or external path to play/use the app

category.description: The academic category of the application

audience.description: The intended target audience for the app

contributorUID.description: UID of the user who published this app

contributorName.description: Name of the user who published this app

contributorPhoto.description: Optional photo of the user who published this app

createdAt.description: The exact date and time when the app was submitted

/users/{userId}.description: Protected user records indexed by Auth UID

/apps/{appId}.description: Global educational applications submitted by community members
